description: File system operation corrections. Path verification, read-before-write, deletion guards.

corrections.what_went_wrong: Deleted/overwritten a file without checking if it was tracked or important
corrections.correct_approach: Always check git status or file importance before delete/overwrite. If untracked and user-created, confirm before removing.
corrections.detection: Any action involving rm, delete, overwrite, or truncate

corrections.what_went_wrong: Assumed a path existed without verifying
corrections.correct_approach: Check that directories and files exist before writing to them or referencing them. Paths change between machines, projects, and sessions.
corrections.detection: Any file write, copy, or move operation

corrections.what_went_wrong: Modified a file without reading it first
corrections.correct_approach: Always read the current state of a file before editing. The file may have changed since you last saw it, or may not contain what you expect.
